mapper.select: select * from nx_customer_promotion_campaign where nx_customer_promotion_campaign_id = #{value} for update
select count(*) from nx_customer_user_referral where campaign_id = #{value}

select source_owner_type as ownerType, source_owner_id as ownerId, count(*) as qualifiedReferralCount from nx_customer_user_referral where campaign_id = #{value} and qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED' group by source_owner_type, source_owner_id order by qualifiedReferralCount desc

select r.*, u.nx_CU_user_id as invitee_nx_CU_user_id, u.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as invitee_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, u.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as invitee_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url, u.nx_CU_wx_phone_number as invitee_nx_CU_wx_phone_number, u.nx_CU_join_date as invitee_nx_CU_join_date, 0 as sub_referral_count from nx_customer_user_referral r inner join nx_customer_user u on u.nx_CU_user_id = r.invitee_user_id where r.campaign_id = #{campaignId} and r.source_owner_type = #{sourceOwnerType} and r.source_owner_id = #{sourceOwnerId} order by r.bind_time desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into nx_customer_promotion_campaign (community_id, commerce_id, campaign_code, campaign_scene, campaign_name, owner_scope, campaign_status, effective_start_at, effective_end_at, campaign_version) values (#{communityId}, #{commerceId}, #{campaignCode}, #{campaignScene}, #{campaignName}, #{ownerScope}, #{campaignStatus}, #{effectiveStartAt}, #{effectiveEndAt}, #{campaignVersion})
